/usr/bin/clang++ CMakeFiles/sdf_editor.dir/sdf_editor_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdf_editor.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdf_editor.dir/src/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdf_editor.dir/src/scene_viewport.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/sdf_editor.dir/home/h-i/Projects/NOAIEngine/testbed/src/sdf_authoring.cpp.o" -o sdf_editor   -L/home/h-i/Projects/NOAIEngine/bin  -Wl,-rpath,/home/h-i/Projects/NOAIEngine/tools/sdf_editor/../../bin:/home/h-i/Projects/NOAIEngine/bin /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 -lengine /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
